title: Solar's Light Armor
description: A simple resource pack to make player skins more visible when wearing armor.
body:
**This pack most likely doesn't work well past 1.21, I don't plan to update it**

This is a simple resource pack I made for multiplayer that makes armor more minimal so you can easily see player skins. 

The pack works on all versions since 1.8, but the special armor trim textures are not yet present, so armor trims will appear floating on your skin.
